entries.name: гҖҗCrab ChampionsгҖ‘Bday battle with Milky QueenгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
Let's celebrate Milky's bday with some crab shooting battles!

Milky Queen: https://twitter.com/milkyqueen_idol

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Tekken Tuesday with Open Sessions and Tourney!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
entries.description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! We are still figuring out how to run our weekly sessions in Tekken 8.

Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!

SESSIONS:
1) session: Coyodachi
2) pw: 5454
3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 
4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog
5) Coyo will call up who is next
6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person
7) leave session after your match with me so others can join

TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc.

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Valentine's Day Customizations and Sessions!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
entries.description:
Let's Celebrate Valentine's Day together! Show our love for our favorite characters and show off your custom Valentine's themed custom outfits!

Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! 

SESSIONS:
1) session: Coyodachi
2) pw: 5454
3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 
4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog
5) Coyo will call up who is next
6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person
7) leave session after your match with me so others can join

TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc.

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN 7гҖ‘Thank You Tekken 7 PartyгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі7
entries.description:
Thank you Tekken 7! Time to celebrate our time with Tekken 7 before 8 comes out! |
There will be fun sessions and tourneys! Come join, everyone is invited as long as the rules below are followed~

How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

entries.description:
Thumbnail to be updated with Eddy and Yoshi! Will watch the trailer for Yoshi and Eddy DLC reveal for Tekken 8 together and try to play them but in T7 (just few more days till 8 comes out!)

Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney!
How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

entries.name: гҖҗCelebrationгҖ‘Coyo's 2nd Year Anniversary!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
2 years since my debut and I get to celebrate it with wonderful vtuber friends I made along the way and Coyodachi! 

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘Last of November! Online sessions with viewersгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі7
entries.description:
Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney!
How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘Halloween Cosplay Party with Coyodachi!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі7
entries.description:
Show us your character customizations for Halloween! What will everyone dress up as?
Rules on costumes: 
- Do not make cosplays of real people/celebrities/vtubers outside of Kemov, etc
- Do not make any inappropriate or controversial customizations
- Basically do not make a customization would put Coyo in a bad situation and/or demonitized. This event is for having fun with everyone!

Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney!
How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘Online Rank & Sessions with viewersгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі7
entries.description:
Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney!
How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘Online Session & Tourney time!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі7
entries.description:
Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney!
How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

entries.description:
I am mostly healed up now and can finally stream normally again! I missed Coyodachi!

Let's play some sessions together~

Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney!
How to join sessions
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later)
3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too)
4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!

How to join Tourneys:
1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer)
2. First come, first serve basis
3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc)
4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).

I use a leverless controller!

entries.name: гҖҗгғӘгғқгғјгғҲпјҒгҖ‘Vtuber at EVO Japan 2023 Short Vlog & TEKKEN 7 FINALS
entries.description:
For a more indepth video about my experience:
https://www.youtube.com/live/qj8CLiTG7iw?feature=share

I went to EVO Japan 2023 and it was my first time!
Everyone I met were so kind and I had a lot of fun. I did see good points and some negative points I hope would be fixed for next year but I really do value the experience! 

I came for TEKKEN and saw the finals in person! I also included some reactions of the TEKKEN 8 character reveals as well into the video. 

I have a lot of respect to the players who competed and hope that I will get another chance to go to EVO again!

I went more indepth of my experience of EVO Japan in my other stream so feel free to check it out!

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘White Day Challenge with ViewersгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
Because today is White Day, there will be a White Day special for today's TEKKEN TUESDAY!
Prize is a Coyo's White Day illustration with your name written on top by Coyo.
14th 6:00am PST/22:00 JST

Competition includes:
- Tourneys
- Best dressed/custom character (White Day themed)
- Best Pun/Joke
- 2 Randomly selected viewers from chat 
- Know your Coyo quiz winner

*One prize per person (if someone wins twice, it will go to the next person)

I may include more chances if I can come up with additional ideas!

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘Video Game Injury - I have Gamer's ThumbгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
Had pain in my hand/wrist so I went to see the doctor and they said that I have "De Quervain's Tenosynovitis" aka "Gamer's Thumb. So I haven't been able to play TEKKEN in a few days. And today's TEKKEN TUESDAY will be a little different than usual! Gaming injuries are not fun. 

Can Coyodachi help me?

entries.name: гҖҗTEKKEN TUESDAYгҖ‘Happy Valentine's Day! Online play with viewers!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
Rules for Session:
- Only accept play for against Coyote (me). This will allow us to have time to do tournament rounds later. We will not have viewers play against each other except for tourneys/tournaments.
- "awoo" in the in-game chat to show that you are a viewer otherwise you might be kicked out
- first come first serve, however some viewers may leave open spots for others after playing
- good sportsmanship, appropriate username

Rules for Tournament:
- "awoo" in the in-game chat to show that you are a viewer otherwise you might be kicked out
- entry is first come first serve (however if we play multiple sessions, leaving slots open for other viewers to allow more people to play is highly encouraged)
- connection with Coyo must be 3 bars or above (if we have enough viewers participating around a similar region, we can set a tournament just for that region to allow everyone to play without connection heavy issues)
- good sportsmanship, appropriate username

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entries.description:
Stream will be open to the public but participation will be limited to members.

First come first serve entry as space may be limited per game. 
Code will be shared via membership community page.

Please do not share the code outside of the membership community tab.

Please set your Gartic Phone name as your name that shows on Youtube chats.

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entries.name: гҖҗAutograph SessionгҖ‘Reveal of the Coyo Signature!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
Autograph Session Rules:
1) I can only write the names for superchats submitted between July 23rd 8:00pm-8:30pm PST/ July 24th 12:00pm-12:30pm JST (I'm sorry, superchats sent beforehand or after will not be eligible!)
2) I will write the name that you have set for your youtube account (name that shows up on chat). And I will not be able to write any names that may deem as offensive, inappropriate, or something that I may be uncomfortable with writing.
3) Any superchat amount (no minimum) is ok! It will be eligible as long as it follows the above rules.

*Cheki = polaroid photo
To save the cheki, you can screenshot it from the stream. If you cannot watch the stream in realtime, when I am writing your cheki, the archive will be available so you will still have access!

Thank you for your understanding! I am looking forward to the autograph session!!

Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin)
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat
рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments
рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space!
рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments
рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream
рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts
рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa
рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs
рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER!
Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

entries.name: гҖҗTutorialгҖ‘Vtuber Idol Step Dance LessonгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
entries.description:
Clip of my idol step dance tutorial / lesson from the 3d debut stream! I hope this can be useful for anyone looking to try learning idol step! Full Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BZHjmV3qFLc&t=1s

*This is not mirrored but you can learn from the video the same as if it is mirrored since the movement for both left and right are the same! :)
*My hands were mostly open during the tutorial but the idol step should be done with your hands in the shape of a fist (relaxed, not too tightly gripped).
